list.name: display_currency
list.label: Currency
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT split_part(unit, '/', 1) AS currency FROM fundamentals WHERE unit ~ '^[A-Z]{3}(/shares)?$' UNION SELECT currency FROM instruments ORDER BY 1
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT split_part(unit, '/', 1) AS currency FROM fundamentals WHERE unit ~ '^[A-Z]{3}(/shares)?$' UNION SELECT currency FROM instruments ORDER BY 1

targets.rawSql: SELECT p.date::timestamptz AS "time", i.symbol AS metric, p.close::float8 * COALESCE(ff.usd_rate / NULLIF(ft.usd_rate, 0), 1) AS value FROM prices p JOIN instruments i ON i.id = p.instrument_id LEFT JOIN fx_usd_daily ff ON ff.currency = i.currency AND ff.date = p.date LEFT JOIN fx_usd_daily ft ON ft.currency = '$display_currency' AND ft.date = p.date WHERE i.kind = 'equity' AND $__timeFilter(p.date) ORDER BY 1

SELECT p.date::timestamptz AS "time", i.symbol AS metric, p.close::float8 * COALESCE(ff.usd_rate / NULLIF(ft.usd_rate, 0), 1) AS value FROM prices p JOIN instruments i ON i.id = p.instrument_id LEFT JOIN fx_usd_daily ff ON ff.currency = i.currency AND ff.date = p.date LEFT JOIN fx_usd_daily ft ON ft.currency = '$display_currency' AND ft.date = p.date WHERE i.kind = 'crypto' AND $__timeFilter(p.date) ORDER BY 1

SELECT p.date::timestamptz AS "time", i.symbol AS metric, p.close::float8 AS value FROM prices p JOIN instruments i ON i.id = p.instrument_id WHERE i.kind = 'forex' AND $__timeFilter(p.date) ORDER BY 1

SELECT DISTINCT ON (i.symbol) i.symbol AS "Symbol", i.name AS "Name", i.currency AS "Ccy", p.date AS "Date", p.close::float8 AS "Close", p.close::float8 * COALESCE(ff.usd_rate / NULLIF(ft.usd_rate, 0), 1) AS "Close ($display_currency)" FROM prices p JOIN instruments i ON i.id = p.instrument_id LEFT JOIN fx_usd_daily ff ON ff.currency = i.currency AND ff.date = p.date LEFT JOIN fx_usd_daily ft ON ft.currency = '$display_currency' AND ft.date = p.date ORDER BY i.symbol, p.date DESC

SELECT i.symbol AS "Symbol", i.name AS "Name", e.earnings_date AS "Earnings date", e.is_estimated AS "Estimated" FROM earnings_dates e JOIN instruments i ON i.id = e.instrument_id WHERE e.earnings_date >= CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY e.earnings_date
